channel.title: Rhizomata
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Rhizomata

item.title: Persuasion of the Laws in Plato’s Crito: When Does It Happen?
item.description: Article by Daniel Kranzelbinder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rhiz-2024-0014

item.title: The Descent of Reason: Reading Plato’s Cave as Psychic Drama
item.description: Article by Daniel Kranzelbinder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rhiz-2024-0013

item.title: Both Generable and Alterable in Aristotle’s On Generation and Corruption I.1 & I.4
item.description: Article by Daniel Kranzelbinder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rhiz-2024-0010

item.title: The Boogeyman in the Closet: A Cognitive-Behavioral Account of Epicurean Emotions
item.description: Article by Daniel Kranzelbinder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rhiz-2024-0012

item.title: Barbara M. Sattler, The Concept of Motion in Ancient Greek Thought: Foundations in Logic, Method, and Mathematics. Cambridge University Press, Cambridge, 2020. x + 427 pp.
item.description: Article by Daniel Kranzelbinder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rhiz-2024-0009
